repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc or InferShape because GetInputShape returns StorageShape* but code uses Shape* and calls GetOriginShape, do not assign to const gert::Shape* and call GetOriginShape; instead assign to const gert::StorageShape* and use its methods directly.

repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with errors like 'class optiling::Ca6k00414CustomTilingData' has no member named 'n', do not access tiling data fields directly (e.g., tiling.n); instead use the corresponding getter methods (e.g., tiling.get_n()).

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories originate from the same torch#1 category and cover common error patterns likely to occur when repairing a new ca6k operator. '53e05051' addresses missing txt bundle blocks, a frequent issue during operator generation. '5014fe8c' handles the StorageShape/Shape mismatch in TilingFunc/InferShape, a recurring compile error. '484f6b62' targets REG_OP redefinition in op_proto.h, a typical build failure. '7d2e93a6' provides guidance on OpAttrDef member usage (Int32/Default), preventing attribute definition errors. '858ad1cf' illustrates correct tiling data field access patterns, avoiding 'has no member' errors. Together they offer a diverse set of fixes that can be adapted to ca6k_04605.
